original_title: Rage clicks detected: user clicked "Submit Order" 6 times
original_description: The "Submit Order" button appears to do nothing, causing the user to click it 6 times in frustration. This is a strong signal of a UX issue. The session replay captures the rage click pattern.

console.message: [UX] Rage clicks detected: 6 clicks on unresponsive button

metadata.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/[REDACTED-IP] Safari/537.36
